name: Dissolution Chamber
description: An Arcanist laboratory for deconstructing and reorganising your spell repertoire.

tiers.description: Basic deconstruction. Unlocks card disenchanting. Slotting cards costs 30 gold.
Refined formulae. +5 splinters per disenchant. Slotting cards costs 20 gold.
Master deconstruction. +10 splinters per disenchant. Slotting cards costs 10 gold. Minimum deck floor reduced to 3.
